rationale: The citing paper is explicitly a commentary/theory note built around interpreting Shiv, Carmon, and Ariely’s 2005 behavioral experiments on price-placebo effects, which matches the cited DOI/title. The citing note says its core argument (neural interpretation and proposed fMRI tests) is derived from those reported findings (e.g., discounted price reducing puzzle performance), indicating substantive dependence rather than a background mention.
